description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a combination of white and gray exterior walls. The property is surrounded by wooden fencing and includes landscaped areas with trees, shrubs, and a small lawn. The front of the house has a driveway leading to a garage, and a main entrance flanked by large windows. The upper floor includes a spacious terrace with outdoor furniture and an umbrella, while the ground floor opens to a private garden area. Large glass windows and sliding doors provide ample natural light and connect the indoor and outdoor spaces. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on open spaces and functional outdoor living areas.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, wooden fencing, landscaped gardens, and a spacious terrace. The design is minimalist and contemporary, emphasizing open spaces and outdoor living.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side and rear of the house, showing the terrace, garden, and a row of tall trees along the wooden fence.
description_view_1: The front view displays the driveway, garage, main entrance, and landscaped front yard with trees and grass.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the long wooden fence, the private garden, and the upper terrace with an umbrella.
description_view_3: The rear and side of the house are visible, featuring the terrace, a small pool or patio area, and additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single modern door, no porch, flanked by large windows and a paved driveway
